perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a maroon and white striped sweater, excitedly presents two large plastic bags of seasoned Vietnamese rice paper to the camera. (2) The scene shifts to a kitchen where the rice paper sheets are placed in a flat black frying pan and toasted over a gas flame until they become rigid and slightly browned. (3) The woman holds a large plate filled with the toasted, triangular-cut snacks and proceeds to eat them with exaggerated expressions of enjoyment and close-up shots of the food's texture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin with high energy. (2) The music continues while clear sound effects of sizzling and the rustling of plastic bags are layered in. (3) The audio shifts to focus on loud, high-fidelity 'crunching' sound effects (ASMR style) as the woman bites into the snacks, with the background music slightly ducked to emphasize the eating sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '上次介紹爆紅的越南米紙' (The popular Vietnamese rice paper I introduced last time) - informative tone. (2) Decorative Text: '烤過也很好吃' (It's also delicious when toasted) - recommendation hook. (3) Effect Text: '好吃到快瘋掉' (So good I'm going crazy) - intense emotional tone with a pink graphic background. (4) Functional Text: '記得先收藏這部影片喔' (Remember to save this video first) - call to action.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female creator is the sole person appearing in the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with fair skin, long dark hair, wearing a maroon and white horizontal striped sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A neutral-colored room with a soft sofa and a typical domestic kitchen with a gas stove and cooking utensils.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut synced with visual transitions

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a specific culinary tip (toasting Vietnamese rice paper) with the audience to enhance the eating experience of a popular snack, while using ASMR elements and high-energy personality to maintain engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator displays the brand packaging clearly and provides an enthusiastic review and usage tutorial for the product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of Traditional Chinese variety-show style captions and ASMR crunch audio focus.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video combines the 'life hack' genre with 'mukbang' to maximize shareability and interest in a specific product.
